articles.title: Tracy McGrady questions whether Celtics are ‘still on same the page’ following Jayson Tatum’s return
articles.description:
"Are we still on the same page, or are we divided because we are not playing our same game?"

The post Tracy McGrady questions whether Celtics are ‘still on same the page’ following Jayson Tatum’s return appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tracy McGrady questions Celtics' team cohesion after Jayson Tatum's return to the lineup.
Tatum's return raises concerns about team dynamics and performance consistency.
Boston fans may worry about the Celtics' playoff readiness amid potential internal divisions.

articles.title: One New Englander is in this year’s class at Boston’s Folk Americana Roots Hall of Fame: Tom Rush
articles.description:
Rush — who’s being inducted with Neil Young, Jackson Browne, Aretha Franklin, and more — talks pot brownies, discovering Joni Mitchell, and riding a train with the Grateful Dead.

The post One New Englander is in this year’s class at Boston’s Folk Americana Roots Hall of Fame: Tom Rush appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tom Rush will be inducted into Boston's Folk Americana Roots Hall of Fame this year.
He joins legends like Neil Young and Aretha Franklin in the 2023 class.
This recognition highlights Boston's rich musical heritage and local artists' contributions.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown sheds light on 1-on-1 meeting with Jayson Tatum ahead of playoffs
articles.description:
Brown told Vince Carter about the meeting he and Tatum had a couple of weeks ago.

The post Jaylen Brown sheds light on 1-on-1 meeting with Jayson Tatum ahead of playoffs appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown discussed a recent 1-on-1 meeting with Jayson Tatum before the playoffs.
The meeting took place a couple of weeks ago, enhancing team chemistry.
Improved collaboration could boost Celtics' performance in upcoming playoff games.
